# ShivMarg (शिवमार्ग)

> ShivMarg is India's Hindi-Maithili Hindu devotional portal — a single destination for mantras, chalisa, aarti, bhajans, and stotras of major Hindu deities, alongside Mithila's literary and cultural heritage (Vidyapati geet, Maithili Panchang). The platform is built for Hindi-speaking mobile users who read and share devotional content via WhatsApp.

Base URL: https://www.shivmarg.live
Language: Hindi (hi), with Maithili-language content sections
Contact: https://www.shivmarg.live/contact
AdSense: ca-pub-5809900825917201

---

## Deity Mantra Collections

### Shiv Mantra — https://www.shivmarg.live/shiva-mantras
24 mantras available. Includes Shiv Stotram ("नमामि शमीशान निर्वाण रूपं..."), Rudrashtakam (https://www.shivmarg.live/shiva-mantras/Namami-samisam-nirvanrupam), Shiv Gayatri Mantra (https://www.shivmarg.live/shiva-mantras/shiva-gayatri-mantra), Shiv Beej Mantra (https://www.shivmarg.live/shiva-mantras/Shiva-beej-mantra), and Mahamrityunjaya Mantra (https://www.shivmarg.live/shiva-mantras/Shiva-mahamrityunjaya-mantra) — "ॐ त्र्यम्बकं यजामहे सुगन्धिं पुष्टिवर्धनम्॥"

### Hanuman Ji — https://www.shivmarg.live/hanumanji
20+ mantras, stotras, chalisa and katha. Core sub-pages:
- Hanuman Chalisa: https://www.shivmarg.live/hanumanji/Hanuman-Chalisa — 40 chaupai by Goswami Tulsidas
- Bajrang Baan: https://www.shivmarg.live/hanumanji/bajrang-baan — protective stotra
- Sundarkand: https://www.shivmarg.live/hanuman-mantras/sundarkand — 60 doha, Ramcharitmanas, 5th kaand
- Hanuman Aarti: https://www.shivmarg.live/hanumanji/Hanuman-ji-aarti
- Hanumashtakam: https://www.shivmarg.live/hanumanji/sankat-mochan-ashtakam — 8 shlokas by Tulsidas
- Panchamukhi Hanuman Mantra: https://www.shivmarg.live/hanuman-mantras/panchamukhi-hanuman-mantra
- Hanuman Kavacham: https://www.shivmarg.live/hanuman-mantras/hanuman-kavacham — full-body protection kavach
- Hanuman Beej Mantra: https://www.shivmarg.live/hanuman-mantras/hanuman-beej-mantra — Tuesday recitation
- Hanuman Gayatri Mantra: https://www.shivmarg.live/hanuman-mantras/hanuman-gayatri-mantra
- 108 Names of Hanuman: https://www.shivmarg.live/hanumanji/hey-dukh-bhanjan-maruti-nandan-sun-lo-meri-pukar
- Hanuman Sahasranama (1000+ names): https://www.shivmarg.live/hanuman-mantras/hanuman-sahasranama
- Sankat Mochan Mantra: https://www.shivmarg.live/hanuman-mantras/sankat-mochan-mantra
- Lanka Dahan Katha: https://www.shivmarg.live/hanuman-mantras/lanka-dahan-katha
- Maruti Stotra: https://www.shivmarg.live/hanuman-mantras/maruti-stotra
- Vayuputra Stotram: https://www.shivmarg.live/hanuman-mantras/vayuputra-stotram
- Mangalvar Vrat Katha: https://www.shivmarg.live/hanuman-mantras/mangalvar-vrat-katha
- Hanuman Jayanti Mantra: https://www.shivmarg.live/hanuman-mantras/hanuman-jayanti-mantra
- Anjaneya Stotram (South Indian tradition): https://www.shivmarg.live/hanuman-mantras/anjaneya-stotram
- Hanuman Puja Vidhi: https://www.shivmarg.live/hanuman-mantras/hanuman-puja-vidhi
- Bala Hanuman Mantra: https://www.shivmarg.live/hanuman-mantras/bala-hanuman-mantra
- Hanuman Dwadash Naam: https://www.shivmarg.live/hanuman-mantras/hanuman-dwadash-naam
- Atulita Bala Stotram: https://www.shivmarg.live/hanumanji/hanuman-bahuk — from Valmiki Ramayana, Sundarkand

### Shri Krishna — https://www.shivmarg.live/Krishna-Mahamantras
28 mantras, including Hare Krishna Mahamantra, Krishna 108 names / Vishnu Sahasranama (https://www.shivmarg.live/Krishna-Mahamantras/Krishna-108-names), bhajans, aarti, and Gita shlokas.

### Maa Durga — https://www.shivmarg.live/durga-mantras
31 mantras. Durga Stuti ("या देवी सर्वभूतेषु शक्तिरूपेण संस्थिता..."), chalisa, aarti, Saptashati mantras.

### Shri Ganesh — https://www.shivmarg.live/ganesh-mantras
18 mantras and stotras ("ॐ गं गणपतये नमः").

### Maa Lakshmi — https://www.shivmarg.live/Lakshmi-mantras
22 mantras. Lakshmi Stotram ("ॐ श्रीं ह्रीं श्रीं महालक्ष्म्यै नमः").

### Shri Ram — https://www.shivmarg.live/Shri-ram-mantra
26 mantras and stotras ("श्री राम जय राम जय जय राम").

### Maa Saraswati — https://www.shivmarg.live/Sharaswati-mantra
15 mantras. Saraswati Vandana ("या कुन्देन्दु तुषार हार धवला या शुभ्र वस्त्रावृता").

### Bhagwan Vishnu — https://www.shivmarg.live/bhagvan-vishnu-mantra
19 mantras. Vishnu Stotram ("ॐ नमो भगवते वासुदेवाय").

### Maa Kali — https://www.shivmarg.live/maha-kali-mantra
17 mantras ("क्रीं काली क्रीं महाकाल्यै नमः").

### Bhagwan Surya — https://www.shivmarg.live/surya-dev
14 mantras ("ॐ ह्रां ह्रीं ह्रौं सः सूर्याय नमः").

### Chandra Mantra — https://www.shivmarg.live/Chandra-mantras
27 mantras for Chandra Dev — cooling, peace, and kavach mantras.

### Gayatri Mata — https://www.shivmarg.live/Gayatri-mantra
12 mantras. Gayatri Mantra ("ॐ भूर्भुवः स्वः तत्सवितुर्वरेण्यम् भर्गो देवस्य धीमहि").

### Shri Kartikeya — https://www.shivmarg.live/kumar-kartikey-mantras
11 mantras and stotras ("ॐ सरवण भव षण्मुखाय नमः").

### Aarti Sangrah — https://www.shivmarg.live/arati
Cross-deity aarti collection.

---

## Maithili Cultural Content

### Vidyapati Geet Sangrah — https://www.shivmarg.live/Vidyapati-Geet-Sangrah
Collection of Maithili poet Mahakavi Vidyapati's devotional and shringar geet, including a Vidyapati biography section. 12 geet across bhakti kavya themes. Sample line: "तोहर मुख देखै सनु भए प्रीति मोरा॥"

### Maithili Bhajan Geet — https://www.shivmarg.live/Maithili-bhajan-geet
20 Shiv bhajans composed in Maithili. Sample line: "हर हर महादेव बम बम भोले जय शम्भो नीलकंठ देव॥"

### Maithili Panchang Patrika — https://www.shivmarg.live/Maithili-Panchang-Patrika
Daily-updated Panchang for the Mithila region (Darbhanga/Madhubani coordinates), calculated via Jean Meeus algorithms with Lahiri Ayanamsa. Provides tithi, vaar, nakshatra, yoga, karan, sunrise/sunset, rahukaal, shubh muhurat, and chandra rashi.

## Panchang & Calendar Tools

### Hindi Panchang Patrika — https://www.shivmarg.live/Hindi-Panchang-Patara
Daily Hindi-language Panchang with the same core data points (tithi, nakshatra, muhurat, etc.), updated daily.

## Articles & Community

### Aalekh (Articles) — https://www.shivmarg.live/aalekh
Hub for Hindi devotional, cultural, and literary articles contributed by registered authors.

### Write Article — https://www.shivmarg.live/article_editor
Article submission editor for approved authors (lekhak role).

### Become an Author — https://www.shivmarg.live/become_author
Registration flow for community members to become published authors (lekhak) on ShivMarg.

### Author Directory — https://www.shivmarg.live/author
Public list of published authors, categorized by content type (poetry / kavita, story / kahani, essay / nibandh, drama / natak, philosophy / darshan).

---
